creator: j@uriah.heep.sax.de
text:
As Masafumi NAKANE wrote:

> In /usr/src/share/doc/dialup.sgml, there is suggestion to refer to
> file ``/sys/doc/options.doc'' which no longer exists in FreeBSD
> distribution.  To avoid confusion, I believe modification is needed.

Ok, thanks, i'm going to commit a fix.  I've also left an explanation
in the `kernel config' section to cover the new options scheme.

-- 
cheers, J"org

joerg_wunsch@uriah.heep.sax.de -- http://www.sax.de/~joerg/ -- NIC: JW11-RIPE
Never trust an operating system you don't have sources for. ;-)
